boundary_binding.action_boundary: May order operations release the tax-exempt sale?

boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CERT-JAD-090 covers date but not class; WARN-JAD-090 open

final_answer: Source boundary remains open. CERT-JAD-090 matches buyer/ship-to/date/category but omits exemption-status class. WARN-JAD-090 requires verification. Per STD-JAD-090-P, class match is mandatory before release. Escalate for class confirmation.
